extraction_notes: Preserved hierarchical offering structure with parent-child tiers for iPhone, Mac, iPad, Apple Watch, AirPods, HomePod, and Apple Content Subscriptions. Mapped five reportable segments with segment-level channels and customer types. Applied hardware sales revenue model to all device offerings and differentiated service revenue models for advertising, care, and content subscriptions.
